'''√f-t-dh''' ('''kafatadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:deadmelt|deadmelt]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-t-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deadmelt|deadmelt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √f-t-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kafatadh
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thifatadh || jifatadh || shifatadh || kifatadh
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthufatadh || jujufatadh || shushufatadh || kukufatadh
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thufatadh || jufatadh || shufatadh || kufatadh
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thufatadh || jufatadh || shufatadh || kufatadh
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thefatadh || jefatadh || shefatadh || kefatadh
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothofatadh || jojofatadh || shoshofatadh || kokofatadh
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thofatadh || jofatadh || shofatadh || kofatadh
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thofatadh || jofatadh || shofatadh || kofatadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || fatadh || fatadh || fatadh || fatadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || fatadh || fatadh || fatadh || fatadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || fatadh || fatadh || fatadh || fatadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || fatadh || fatadh || fatadh || fatadh
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæfatadh || jæfatadh || shæfatadh || kæfatadh
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathafatadh || jajafatadh || shashafatadh || kakafatadh
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thafatadh || jafatadh || shafatadh || kafatadh
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thafatadh || jafatadh || shafatadh || kafatadh
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shafatadh
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshafatadh
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishafatadh
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shafatadhnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshafatadhnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishafatadhnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shafatadhshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshafatadhnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishafatadhshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shafatadhro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshafatadhnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishafatadhro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shafatadhmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshafatadhnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishafatadhmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shafatadhsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshafatadhnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishafatadhsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shafatadhng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshafatadhnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishafatadhng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shafatadhya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshafatadhnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishafatadhya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shafatadhyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshafatadhnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishafatadhyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shafatadhnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshafatadhnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishafatadhnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shafatadhnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshafatadhnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishafatadhnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shafatadhnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshafatadhnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishafatadhnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shafatadhshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshafatadhnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishafatadhshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shafatadhshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshafatadhnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishafatadhshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shafatadhshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshafatadhnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishafatadhshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shafatadhronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshafatadhnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishafatadhronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shafatadhroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshafatadhnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishafatadhroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shafatadhromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshafatadhnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishafatadhromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shafatadhmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshafatadhnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishafatadhmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shafatadhmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshafatadhnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishafatadhmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shafatadhmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshafatadhnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishafatadhmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
